title: lupinus glabratus
intro: Lupinus glabratus, also known as the smooth lupine, is a perennial plant species within the legume family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lupinus glabratus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an expectorant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to relieve respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
